article.title: Speclint — Clean spec in. Clean code out.
article.body_markdown:
# Speclint — Clean spec in. Clean code out.

Score your specs on 5 dimensions before AI agents build from them.

## The Problem

AI coding agents fail on vague specs. "Build a dashboard" → garbage. Teams waste tokens and hours debugging spec-quality issues.

## The Solution

Deterministic regex-based scoring (0-100) across 5 dimensions catches vague verbs, missing acceptance criteria, untestable requirements, and missing constraints. AI-powered rewrites transform failing specs into agent-ready instructions.

## How It Works

1. Paste any user story or spec
2. Get scored 0-100 across 5 dimensions
3. If below threshold, get an AI-powered rewrite

## Try It

- **Website:** https://speclint.ai
- **CLI:** `npx speclint lint`
- **Open Source:** MIT licensed

---

*What do you think? Drop a comment if you're using AI coding agents — I'd love to hear about your spec quality challenges.*
